productDisplayName: Scullers For Her Women Viscose Tunics Purple Tops
description: Composition Black round neck tunic top made of 100% viscose, with elbow length sleeves and uneven hemline and metallic embellishments on the neckline Fitting Slim Wash care Wash dark colours separately Hand wash or machine wash in cold water Use mild detergent Tumble dry low Dry in shade Do not bleach Warm iron Slip into style with ease in this black tunic top from scullers. The contoured seams and the rolled over sleeves makes this tunic top a great choice for everyday wear. Team it with tights, stilettos and sleek, long earrings for a really cool look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5’9”; Chest: 33”; Shoulders: 15.5”
